10× gitagent v0.1.0
home examples ★ GitHub
13 example agents · copy · customize · ship

The 13 examples
that ship with gitagent.

Every one of these lives as a YAML file in examples/. Copy it. Rename it. Tweak the model, the tools, the triggers. Ship it as your own. They cover the 90% of agent use cases.

01 support

triage

Auto-label and acknowledge new issues

→ issues.opened
02 docs

doc

Keep README and docs in sync with code

→ push.main
03 release

release

Draft release notes from merged PRs

→ release.published
04 community

welcome

Greet first-time contributors with care

→ issues.opened
05 productivity

standup

Generate a daily standup digest

→ schedule.daily
06 security

security

Scan deps, audit secret patterns

→ schedule.weekly
07 maintenance

dependencies

Open issues for outdated dependencies

→ schedule.weekly
08 meta

meta

Generate project changelog from commits

→ push.main
09 meta

changelog

Maintain CHANGELOG.md from PR history

→ release.published
10 quality

tests

Run validation test suites on PRs

→ pull_request.opened
11 ops

oncall

Surface stale issues + unassigned PRs

→ schedule.daily
12 productivity

weekly-summary

Post a weekly summary issue

→ schedule.weekly
13 quality

refactor-helper

Suggest small, safe refactorings

→ pull_request.opened
